chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ عَقِيقَةَ الذَّكَرِ وَ الْأُنْثَى سَوَاءٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The Aqeeqa of the male and the female is the same

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/47)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/47)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْعَقِيقَةِ فَقَالَ فِي الذَّكَرِ وَ الْأُنْثَى سَوَاءٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,
‘I asked himasws about the Aqeeqa, so heasws said: ‘Regarding the male and the female, is the same’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Khalid from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘ah who has said the following: “I once asked him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about ‘Aqiqah and he (the Imam) said, ‘It is the same for both male and female.”’
